title: Neural Text Normalization for Converting Informal Text to Standard Form
abstract: We develop a neural model that converts informal social media text to standard written form for downstream NLP processing.

title: Cloud Resource Allocation Optimization Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This work applies deep reinforcement learning to optimize cloud computing resource allocation, reducing costs while meeting service level agreements.

title: Semi-Supervised Learning for Image Classification with Consistency Regularization
abstract: We improve semi-supervised image classification by enforcing consistency between model predictions on original and augmented unlabeled images.

title: Detecting Hate Speech in Code-Mixed Social Media Text
abstract: This study develops models for detecting hate speech in code-mixed social media content that combines multiple languages in single posts.

title: Structure from Motion Using Deep Learning for 3D Scene Reconstruction
abstract: We combine traditional structure from motion with deep learning features to improve 3D reconstruction accuracy from unordered image collections.

title: Personalized Nutrition Recommendation Using Knowledge Graphs and User Preferences
abstract: This paper builds a personalized nutrition system that combines food knowledge graphs with individual dietary preferences and health goals.

title: Training Deep Networks with Noisy Labels Using Loss Correction Methods
abstract: We propose loss correction techniques that enable accurate deep network training when a portion of training labels are corrupted or incorrect.

title: Extractive Summarization of Legal Documents Using Sentence Classification
abstract: This work develops a sentence classification approach for extractive summarization of legal case documents, identifying key precedent-setting sentences.

title: Autonomous Exploration Mapping Using Gaussian Processes
abstract: We use Gaussian process regression for autonomous robot exploration, building informative maps of unknown environments with minimal traversal.

title: Multi-Hop Question Answering Over Knowledge Bases Using Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This study trains agents using reinforcement learning to perform multi-hop reasoning over knowledge bases for complex question answering.

title: Skin Lesion Classification Using Ensemble Deep Learning and Transfer Learning
abstract: We combine multiple pretrained CNN models in an ensemble approach for classifying skin lesions from dermatoscopic images.

title: Privacy Risks in Language Models: Extracting Training Data Through Prompting
abstract: This paper demonstrates that large language models can inadvertently memorize and regurgitate sensitive training data through carefully crafted prompts.

title: Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition Using Depth Cameras and Neural Networks
abstract: We develop a real-time hand gesture recognition system using depth camera input and lightweight neural networks for human-computer interaction.

title: Optimizing Warehouse Robot Routing Using Ant Colony Algorithms
abstract: This work applies ant colony optimization to warehouse robot path planning, reducing order fulfillment times in large distribution centers.

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation of Urban Scenes
abstract: We propose an unsupervised method for adapting semantic segmentation models trained on synthetic data to real urban street scenes.
